title: Update containers/image to v2.0.0
body:
This adds v2 registries.conf format, including mirror support.

Supersedes #1526.

comments.body: Changes LGTM, I just wonder if we should bump c/image to 1.5.2 or perhaps 1.6 first and then merge here?

It would be 2.0 (breaking API changes).

A release does make sense, but I’d like to finish the documentation for that first.  In the meantime, the necessary code changes in Buildah can at least pass CI, if not be merged.
Adding [WIP] since we don't want to merge this until new version of containers/image has been cut.
Updated to v2.0.0. @rhatdan please remove WIP and merge if convenient.

Wowsa @mtrmac , thanks for the full service on this one!
@rhatdan PTAL.

:pushpin: Commit 6ace324 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 6ace324357a6de21d2f228bcb97a6d06c7395bd3 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
Just realized I never put an LGTM on this one, now I have.
